name: Caramel Nut Angel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Beat egg whites to soft peaks. Gradually add sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating 1 minute after each addition until a stiff meringue forms.
3. Fold in nuts. Spread into a well-buttered 9-inch pie pan with sides extending over the rim. Bake for 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove and cool.
4. Fill with ice cream; cover tightly; freeze.
5. In a saucepan, melt butter. Stir in sugar and cook until dissolved. Slowly mix in half and half and cook one minute, stirring constantly. Stir in vanilla and nuts; let cool slightly.
6. When ready to serve, pour over the frozen pie.
